description: Configure Stellarium for a planetarium show simulating the 7 BC (-6 astronomical year) triple conjunction of Jupiter and Saturn over Jerusalem (31.77° N, 35.21° E). The display should show constellation lines, names, artwork, and planet labels, with the atmosphere and landscape disabled. At 21:00 UTC, capture screenshots of the planets' retrograde loop near Pisces on approximately June 1, October 1, and December 1 of year -6. Write a presenter script to ~/Desktop/planetarium_script.txt that includes the viewing location, the planets involved, the constellation Pisces, and the historical year.
